name: CRYO CELL INTERNATIONAL INC
summary: Cryo-Cell International, Inc. is a cord blood and cord tissue banking company that collects, processes, and stores umbilical cord blood and cord tissue stem cells for potential future medical use. The company also pursues product diversification through biopharmaceutical manufacturing and operating clinics, holds an IP portfolio including umbilical cord blood and cord tissue license agreements, and engages in collaborative research partnerships related to stem cell therapies.
